description:
Open the presentation at ~/Documents/Presentations/platform_architecture.odp. Navigate to Slide 2 titled 'System Architecture'. Create a microservices architecture diagram for an e-commerce platform organized into three horizontal tiers.

Client Tier (top of slide): two boxes labeled 'Web App' and 'Mobile App', both filled orange.

Service Tier (middle): an 'API Gateway' box filled dark blue at the top of this tier, with connector arrows pointing down to four service boxes in a horizontal row beneath it: 'User Service', 'Product Service', 'Order Service', 'Payment Service', all filled blue.

Data Tier (bottom): three boxes labeled 'PostgreSQL', 'MongoDB' filled green, and 'Redis Cache' filled red.

Draw connector arrows between components: both client boxes to API Gateway; API Gateway to each of the four services; User Service to PostgreSQL; Product Service to PostgreSQL; Order Service to both PostgreSQL and MongoDB; Payment Service to PostgreSQL.

Enclose each tier in a large dashed-border rectangle with no fill, labeled with the tier name (e.g. 'Client Tier'). All component boxes should have centered white bold text. Save the file when finished.
